aboutParagraph:
Hi, my name is Gautam Jain. I am a Tech and Space Enthusiast. I am a CSE Major, and currently, I am working as a PA in Cognizant.

I have been fascinated by the wondrous aspects of technology ever since I was a kid...

I graduated with my bachelor's degree from GNDEC, Ludhiana in August 2023. Throughout my course, I invested in core concepts like Data Structures and Algorithms, Database management, and Cyber Security.

Currently working as a Programmer Analyst at Cognizant, brushing up on Oracle SQL, PL/SQL, and Spring Boot.
